MOTION To Overrule Objections To Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records To: 1) Old Republic Title Company; 2) First Republic Bank
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PETER ZOLA'S MOTION To Overrule Objections To Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records To: 1) Old Republic Title Company; 2) First Republic Bank.

Transferred to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on the same date in room 301 on the discovery calendar.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HEK)

Plaintiff Peter Zola'S Motion To Overrule Objections To Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records To: 1) Old Republic Title Company; 2) First Republic Bank
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert H. Dewberry, esq. (949-955-2940) for Plaintiff.
Lauren Elliott (415-350-8095) OTHER, in propria persona.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Peter Zola'S Motion To Overrule Objections To Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records To: 1) Old Republic Title Company; 2) First Republic Bank is Granted. Lauren M. Elliott's objections to the subpoenas duces tecum issued to Old Republic Title Company and First Republic Bank are overruled. The records requested shall be handled confidentially to address Ms. Elliott's privacy concerns.

Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Peter Zolas Notice Of Hearing On His Request For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant John Brent Elliot.
Dept. 514. Judge: Newton Lam. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Paul T. Llewellyn, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Peter Zola, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant John Brent Elliot.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on September 6, 2018, and personally served on defendant John Brent Elliot on February 9, 2019.
Default as to defendant John Brent Elliot was entered on March 12, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed March 12, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Peter Zola, and against the Defaulted Defendant John Brent Elliot, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $150,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $21,747.95.
Attorney Fees - $13,000.00.
Costs - $5,137.38.

Total - $189,885.33.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2019 Continued To Aug-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2019 Continued To May-08-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
